description: Use this API routine to modify the control mode and mode switch voltage of an existing multi- terminal dc line in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Multi-Terminal DC Transmission Line Data). Converter data, dc bus data, and dc link data are specified via the MULTI_TERM_DC_CONVR_DATA, MULTI_TERM_DC_BUS_DATA, and MULTI_TERM_DC_LINK_DATA API routines respectively. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, intgaro = multi_term_dc_line_chng(dc, intgari, realar)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the multi-terminal dc line for which data is to be specified; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: intgari
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying one element corresponding to value INTGAR(1) as described above. (input).

return_values.name: intgaro
return_values.description: An array of seven elements specifying corresponding to values INTGAR(2) through INTGAR(8) as described above. (output).

realar.description: VCMOD, mode switch dc voltage (kV) (0.0 by default).

intgaro.description: positive pole voltage controlling converter index (returned).
negative pole voltage controlling converter index, or zero if the negative pole is not being modeled (returned).
positive pole voltage controlling converter bus number (returned).
positive pole voltage controlling converter bus number (returned).

error_codes.description: blank dc line name is invalid.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid dc line control mode.
